narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 6-C (precinct in Scioto County) has 651 registered voters, with 62.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.9 percentage points.
